hooks.command: changed=$(git diff HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null; git log --oneline -5 --name-only --pretty=format: 2>/dev/null); if echo "$changed" | grep -qE '(ui/|navigation/|EditScreen|ListScreen)'; then matches=$(echo "$changed" | grep -E '(ui/|navigation/|EditScreen|ListScreen)' | sort -u | tr '\n' '  '); printf '{"systemMessage": "⚠️  UI files changed — check if EditScreenUiTest.kt needs updating!\nChanged: %s"}' "$matches"; fi
